title: Find Square Root of the Sum of Squares

statement.markdown: Find the square root of the sum of squares of an array of positive integers. If the sum of squares is not a perfect square, return the integer part of the square root.
statement.inputFormat: Input will be an array of integers.

examples.explanation: The sum of squares is 14, and the square root of 14 is 3 with a decimal of 0.82, so the output is 3.

hints.text: Don't forget to handle floating point precision.

editorial.title: Find Square Root of the Sum of Squares
editorial.intuition: We need to find the square root of the sum of squares of an array of positive integers.
editorial.bruteForce: Calculate the sum of squares and then find its square root.
editorial.optimalSolution: Calculate the sum of squares and then use integer division to find the square root, discarding the decimal part.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: This solution is correct because it handles the case where the sum of squares is not a perfect square.
editorial.dryRun: Let's try it with the example input [1, 2, 3].
